notice: This contract implements a vault to hold collateral for peer-to-peer loans

initialise(address,address).notice: Initialize a vault with the given owner, enabling it to receive specific tokens.

deposit(uint256,address).notice: Deposit tokens into the vault on behalf of a specified wallet.

withdraw(uint256,address).notice: Withdraw tokens from the vault to a specified wallet.

withdrawable_balance().notice: Get the withdrawable balance of the vault.

withdraw_pending(uint256).notice: Withdraw tokens from the vault that are pending transfer to the sender.

withdraw_funds(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw specified funds from the vault to the caller.

transfer_funds(address,uint256,address).notice: Transfer specified funds from the vault to a specified wallet.

buy(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Buy DS tokens using stable coins via the SecuritizeSwap contract.

title: P2PLendingVault
author: [Zharta](https://zharta.io/)
details: Actual vaults are minimal proxy contracts to this, deployed via CREATE2 by the lending contract

initialise(address,address).details: Ensures that the vault is not already initialized before setting the owner and caller.

params._owner: The address of the vault's owner.
params._token: The address of the ERC20 token that the vault will hold.

deposit(uint256,address).details: Transfers tokens from the wallet to the vault and emits a Deposit event.

params.amount: The amount of tokens to deposit.
params.wallet: The address of the wallet from which tokens will be transferred.

withdraw(uint256,address).details: Transfers tokens from the vault to the wallet and emits a Withdraw event.

params.amount: The amount of tokens to withdraw.
params.wallet: The address of the wallet to which tokens will be transferred.

withdrawable_balance().details: Calculates the withdrawable balance by subtracting pending transfers from the total token balance.

returns._0: The withdrawable balance of the vault.

withdraw_pending(uint256).details: Transfers tokens from the vault to the sender and emits a WithdrawPending event.

params.amount: The amount of tokens to withdraw.

withdraw_funds(address,uint256).details: Transfers the specified amount of payment tokens from the vault to the caller (main contract).

params.payment_token: The address of the payment token to withdraw.
params.amount: The amount of tokens to withdraw.

transfer_funds(address,uint256,address).details: Transfers the specified amount of payment tokens from the vault to the specified wallet.

params.payment_token: The address of the payment token to withdraw.
params.amount: The amount of tokens to withdraw.
params.wallet: The address of the wallet to which tokens will be transferred.

buy(address,uint256,uint256).details: Approves the SecuritizeSwap contract to spend stable coins and executes the buy operation.

params.min_ds_token_amount: The minimum amount of DS tokens to receive.
params.stable_coin_amount: The amount of stable coins to spend.
